title: Creating a Content-Based Image Classification Model with Complex Edge Cases
scenario: Develop a content-based image classification model to classify images into predefined categories based on their visual features. The model should handle complex edge cases such as images with varying orientations, resolutions, and lighting conditions. Consider using a deep learning approach with convolutional neural networks (CNNs).
constraints: Must use a deep learning framework such as TensorFlow or PyTorch

evaluationCriteria.description: The model should achieve high accuracy in classifying images into their correct categories.
The model should handle complex edge cases such as images with varying orientations, resolutions, and lighting conditions correctly.
The code should be readable, well-organized, and follow standard Python coding conventions.
The model should be computationally efficient and able to handle large datasets.
